steps.title: Choose two points on the line
steps.content: Use points on the line of best fit, not individual scatterplot points. Two readable points on the line are approximately $(0,12)$ and $(10,1)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content: Use change in $y$ divided by change in $x$: $$ \frac{1-12}{10-0}=\frac{-11}{10}=-1.1 $$ The answer is B.
